title: Pre-npmx Meetup: Connect with Key Contributors

topics.title: Day-One Support for React Router 8
topics.summary: Netlify has announced day-one support for React Router 8, highlighting its commitment to modern frameworks. The update includes features like ESM only, Trusted Publishing, and compatibility with Node.js 22+ and Vite 6+.

topics.title: Pre-npmx Meetup
topics.summary: A pre-npmx meetup was organized featuring key contributors like @erus.dev, @willow.sh, and @goose.icu. This event aims to foster collaboration and discussion among developers ahead of the main npmx event.
